steps.title: Follow the public-knowledge logic
steps.content: The passage says economics is central to understanding politics and that an electorate cannot function if economic issues remain only with experts.

steps.title: Choose the importance word
steps.content: "Critical" means crucial, so it explains why economics is too important to leave to economists alone. A would support expert control, while B and C do not explain the need for broad public understanding. The answer is D.
